_comment: Machine-readable skill routing. Agent reads at Boot B2 to match intent → load skill. Each skill defines sections[] for Loop Architecture.
_always_loaded_note: Skills in this list load unconditionally at Boot — no keyword match needed. Both have entries in skills{} for completeness (see token_tracker and identity entries).

mece.trigger: Loop Phase 2 — runs once per task after Info Gather Loop. Builds section-based plan mapping 1:1 to target Skill sections[]. Output MUST be written to .sessions/mece_plan.md.
mece.skip_when: read-only task OR single file edit with backlinks=0 AND no ERR documentation needed OR resuming with existing .sessions/mece_plan.md (skip Phase 1+2, jump to Phase 3 at first [/] or [ ] section)

coder.trigger: Creating new files, scaffolding features, adding new pages or API routes

editor.trigger: Modifying, debugging, or fixing existing files

file_manager.trigger: MANDATORY after any file is created, moved, deleted, or has imports changed

variable_manager.trigger: MANDATORY after any symbol is created, renamed, deleted, or its body is edited

session_manager.trigger: Token pause, blocked halt, session rotation, task completion, or user-requested close. Also handles mece_plan.md clear flow on 'จบ session' and CFP flag review (reads .sessions/cfp_flags.md at Step 0.5 — asks user to confirm any correction events as CFP entries before closing).

token_tracker.trigger: Boot-load only — SESSION_TOTAL read once at Boot, tracked in memory per turn, written at checkpoints

identity.trigger: Always loaded via always_loaded[] — persona and communication rules active every session
identity._note: No keyword routing needed. Entry here matches always_loaded[] pattern (same as token_tracker) for completeness and discoverability.

agent.trigger: Meta-orchestration — explicitly invoked when re-routing is needed or user requests orchestration across multiple skills
agent._note: Does NOT override fallback block — fallback remains editor per CLAUDE.md §B2. This entry enables explicit keyword routing to agent skill only.

error_protocol.description: MANDATORY 3-step check before ANY debug or bug fix (R9). Skipping = rule violation.
steps: grep -A 12 '<symptom_keyword>' knowledge/error_index.md | head -30   → if ERR found: apply immediately, stop
grep -A 8 '"FailingSymbol"' knowledge/index_variables.json          → check source, line, used_in

fallback.trigger: No keyword matches any skill — default to editor (modify/debug existing files)
fallback.note: Matches CLAUDE.md §B2 and AGENTS.md §Boot — both specify 'editor' as fallback

learned_routes._comment: Agent appends confirmed keyword→skill pairs here after repeated use. Format per entry: {keyword, skill_path, uses, last_gap}
